heading: Naringal East vs Naroghid — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Naringal East, Victoria and Naroghid, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Naroghid has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Naringal East (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Naringal East or Naroghid safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Naringal East has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Naroghid scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Naringal East scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Naroghid scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Naringal East or Naroghid?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Naroghid has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
